text.title: Trunk-Based Feature Flags Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a flag spec by completeness of required fields. Branches name observable spec fields; leaves reference rules.

decision-tree.root-question: Are the prerequisites satisfied: flag service present, PR open, owner identifiable?

branch.when: prereqs_met == true AND owner_is_team_alias == false AND cleanup_ticket_open == false
prereqs_met == true AND owner_is_team_alias == false AND cleanup_ticket_open == true AND ramp_plan_missing_or_single_step == true
prereqs_met == true AND owner_is_team_alias == false AND cleanup_ticket_open == true AND ramp_plan_missing_or_single_step == false AND kill_switch_verified == false
prereqs_met == true AND owner_is_team_alias == false AND cleanup_ticket_open == true AND ramp_plan_missing_or_single_step == false AND kill_switch_verified == true AND zombie_quota_exceeded == true
prereqs_met == true AND owner_is_team_alias == false AND cleanup_ticket_open == true AND ramp_plan_missing_or_single_step == false AND kill_switch_verified == true AND zombie_quota_exceeded == false

text.example: prereqs_met=true → owner ruslan@faion.net is named → cleanup_ticket TICKET-4421 open → ramp_plan has 4 stages → kill_switch_test_run_id verified → owner has 1 active flag → verdict=approve (ref run-the-checklist).
